title: plocama brevifolia subsp. dyris
intro: Plocama brevifolia subsp. dyris is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly found in the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Plocama brevifolia subsp. dyris include its ability to reduce fever, soothe skin irritations, and ease respiratory issues. Herbal preparations often involve infusions of the plant's leaves or roots, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or topical creams.
